notes: Solid, complete Asteroids implementation with all core mechanics (thrust, fire, hyperspace, saucer, wave progression, lives, hi-score), proper wrapping, invulnerability, particles, and audio — minor quirk is the hyperspace mechanic has a 1/6 chance of instant death which is unconventional but intentional.
A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone, but awkward hyperspace behavior, simplistic saucer logic, and some control/state quirks keep it well short of a polished benchmark-quality build.
